## Source: amazon-inspector (7b5848598772336361b5ae5218b3379ba6b80420c35d0ef05fcfae6d82688a29)
The package mabibilabub was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (61a1af8f9e6be576e0cc2c70e4c64eaa8376171e26c2bebc2085958f4f8d965d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'mabibilabub' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
